title: DustbinX
description: The plugin that dispose the material in the gui.
body:
# Information

DustbinX is a lightweight, user-friendly Minecraft plugin designed for effortless item disposal. With DustbinX, players can open a virtual "dustbin" with up to 26 slots to throw away items they no longer need. The plugin supports commands like /dustbin, /trashcan, and /dispose, offering flexible options for tidying up inventories. Perfect for survival servers, DustbinX helps reduce clutter and maintain organized inventories.

## Commands
/dustbinx
/dustbin
/trashcan
/disposal
__All these commands have the same work__

### Permissions
Slots:
dustbinx.slot.1
dustbinx.slot.2
dustbinx.slot.3
dustbinx.slot.4
dustbinx.slot.5
dustbinx.slot.6

Here, 1 slot means: 1 Row Of Chest

**Admin Permissions**
dustbinx.admin

![GUI For Disposal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6292702b568c332aa5daaa66cd6dc9079f6ada31.png)
